headline: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
summary: Mercedes unveiled its ultra-high performance AMG GT 4-door EV coupe. This electric super sedan can accelerate from 0-60 mph in just 2 seconds. Technology is borrowed from their record-breaking XX concept car.

headline: Wear OS 7 will keep track of deliveries and sports scores on your wrist
summary: Google announced Wear OS 7, its next major smartwatch update. New Live Updates feature brings delivery and sports score tracking to your wrist. It mirrors iPhone-style Live Activities, enhancing on-watch notifications.

headline: Plex is tripling the price of a lifetime pass to $750 after doubling it last year
summary: Plex is drastically increasing the price of its lifetime pass. The cost will triple to $750 starting July 1st. Customers have until then to lock in current rates.

headline: Demis Hassabis said this might be the ‘foothills of the singularity.’ What?
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis called Google I/O a 'profound moment for humanity.' He suggested we are witnessing the 'foothills of the singularity' through AI advancements. Google's AGI research aims to benefit the entire world.

headline: Hasbro Cancels Dungeons & Dragons Game from Star Wars Jedi: Survivor Director
summary: Hasbro has cancelled a new Dungeons & Dragons game. The game was being developed by Stig Asmussen, director of Star Wars Jedi: Survivor. No further details on the project's cancellation were provided.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Shows Off No-HUD Option
summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced will offer a no-HUD option. Players can completely disable the on-screen display at will. The feature enhances immersion for the upcoming Black Flag remake.

headline: Save 30% off the Bluetti AC70 768Wh 1,000W LiFePO4 Power Station During the AliExpress Memorial Day Sale
summary: Get 30% off the Bluetti AC70 power station. Available for $80 less on AliExpress than Amazon. A powerful 768Wh, 1,000W portable power solution.

headline: Get a 48V 500W Adult Electric Scooter with 22-Mile Range and a Top Speed of 22 MPH for $165
summary: An adult electric scooter is available for just $165. It features a 22-mile range and a top speed of 22 MPH. Described as the most powerful e-scooter under $200.

headline: UK loosens Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
summary: The UK has eased some sanctions on Russian oil. This move comes amid increasing fuel supply concerns. It reflects issues from an effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Arsenal players celebrate title at Emirates at 5am
summary: Arsenal players and fans celebrated a title win. Celebrations continued at the Emirates Stadium until 5 AM. This marks the club's first title in 22 years.

headline: UK should set maximum working temperature rules, advisers say
summary: Climate watchdog advises the UK to implement maximum working temperature rules. Governments have failed to prepare the UK for extreme heat. New regulations are urged to protect workers.

headline: Boss of Sarah Ferguson-linked firm used royal links to threaten worker with jail
summary: A firm boss, linked to Sarah Ferguson, threatened an employee with jail. The threat involved allegedly hacking emails at the app vVoosh. A recording of the threat was obtained by the BBC.
